_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Conduct open source research via various online tools.
reference_document_element_description: Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with engineering teams to operationalize novel approaches.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-001 (AB, cosine: 0.392), LS-S-004 (LS, cosine: 0.392).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.5/10 (raw 0.349). Shared vocabulary: [research]. DCWF-only terms [conduct, online, open, source, tools, various] vs WIDAI-only terms [applicable, approaches, engineering, findings, methods, novel] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.876, R=0.849). P exceeds R by 0.027 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 14 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.5%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Conduct open source research via various online tools." and "Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with eng". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.405 > STS 0.349 (gap +0.055). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [research] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.5%. Shared tokens: [research]. DCWF-only: [conduct, online, open, source, tools, various]. WIDAI-only: [applicable, approaches, engineering, findings, methods, novel].
